name_en: BV's elegant mini tote is here. This time it comes with a long strap for crossbody or shoulder wear. Every piece of leather on the bag is handcrafted and finished repeatedly. If you pursue the texture of handmade craftsmanship, you absolutely cannot miss this [Heart]. The large woven element makes it a great commuter item. The overall simple design is both chic and stylish, easy to match, and full of the brand's signature minimalist style. Lightweight and versatile, it's a favorite for many. This one is a safe bet.
